0.text: Widespread pneumonic consolidation areas in the upper and middle lobes of the right lung

1.text: Widespread pneumonic consolidation areas in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

2.text: Nodular consolidation area in the laterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

3.text: Nodular pneumonic consolidation areas in the apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe

4.text: Ground-glass density increases in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

5.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific parenchymal nodules in both lungs
